overall.description: A first-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night during light rain. The scene features neon-lit buildings, wet reflective streets, and sparse pedestrian and vehicle traffic. The footage is from a video game engine, showcasing a cinematic urban environment with towering skyscrapers and digital billboards.

storefront with illuminated interior, teal accent lighting, and visible signage

segments.scene_description: Walking along a wet commercial sidewalk at night, passing a building with distinctive yellow neon trim and glass storefronts. The pavement reflects the neon lights, and a few pedestrians are visible walking in the opposite direction.

segments.scene_description: Turning left at the corner, the scene opens into a wider intersection approach. Red and white traffic barriers line the sidewalk while skyscrapers with digital billboards rise in the distance. A car drives past on the wet street to the left.

segments.scene_description: Walking along the downtown street with a curved glass tower on the left and an elevated transit track on the right. The camera looks up to reveal towering skyscrapers against the night sky with rain falling, surrounded by large digital billboards.

segments.scene_description: Crossing the wide street at a prominent yellow striped crosswalk, moving with a group of pedestrians toward a convenience store on the opposite corner. The area is open and exposed to the rain, with traffic lights and digital billboards visible in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rain-slicked cyberpunk district, moving from a narrow commercial sidewalk into the expansive heart of a neon-lit downtown. It begins by passing glass storefronts accented with yellow neon trim, where the wet pavement mirrors the vibrant lights and a few pedestrians drift by. As the camera turns left at a corner, the view opens into a wider intersection lined with red and white traffic barriers, with a car gliding past toward a horizon of towering skyscrapers and digital billboards. The scene then shifts along a downtown street flanked by a curved glass tower and an elevated transit track, tilting upward to reveal the rain falling against a backdrop of massive glowing screens. Finally, the camera moves through a sheltered walkway with a multicolored neon ceiling before emerging back into the rain to cross a wide, yellow-striped crosswalk toward a corner convenience store.
